reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate PodConnect
reauth_confirm.description: PodConnect needs to re-authenticate with your Spotify account.

abort.already_configured: This Spotify account is already configured.
abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress.
abort.missing_configuration: The integration is not configured. Add Spotify application credentials first.
abort.no_url_available: No URL available. See the documentation for more information.
abort.reauth_account_mismatch: The authenticated Spotify account does not match the one being re-authenticated.
abort.user_not_premium: Spotify Premium is required to control playback.

init.title: Local speakers (PodConnect add-on)
init.description: Optional. Enter the PodConnect add-on manager URL to add account-agnostic local speaker controls (a media player and a Release button per HomePod room). The add-on uses host networking, so this is your Home Assistant host's LAN IP on port 8099. Leave empty to use Spotify control only.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the PodConnect add-on manager. Check the URL and that the add-on is running.

application_credentials.description: Create an app in the [Spotify developer dashboard]({developer_console_url}) with redirect URI `https://my.home-assistant.io/redirect/oauth`, add your Spotify account under User Management, then enter the Client ID and Client Secret below.
